creator: vhaisman@gmail.com
text:
/usr/local/share/portmanager/patch-bsd.port.mk-0.3.6 does not seem to work for current ports tree:

patching bsd.port.mk-=>cd /usr/ports/Mk; patch < /usr/local/share/portmanager/patch-bsd.port.mk-0.3.6;
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|--- /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk  Tue Nov  8 01:02:51 2005
|+++ bsd.port.mk        Wed Nov 16 02:16:57 2005
--------------------------
Patching file bsd.port.mk using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 2049.
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to bsd.port.mk.rej
done
